title: Block Traits
description: Change the connection, multiblock state, placement position and/or direction behaviors of a block

minecraft:connection.title: Minecraft Connection
minecraft:connection.description:
Adds connection states to the block. The values of these states are updated when the block or neighboring blocks change.

Properties:
• enabled_states (string[])

defaultSnippets.label: Block Connection
defaultSnippets.description: Adds connection states to the block. The values of these states are updated when the block or neighboring blocks change.

minecraft:multi_block.title: Minecraft Multi Block
minecraft:multi_block.description:
Adds the "minecraft:multi_block_part" state and multi block functionality to the block.

Properties:
• direction (string)
• enabled_states (string[])
• parts (int) = 2

defaultSnippets.label: Block Multi Block
defaultSnippets.description: Adds the "minecraft:multi_block_part" state and multi block functionality to the block.

minecraft:placement_direction.title: Minecraft Placement Direction
minecraft:placement_direction.description:
Adds the "minecraft:cardinal_direction", "minecraft:facing_direction" and/or "minecraft:corner_and_cardinal_direction" states and setter function to the block.

Properties:
• blocks_to_corner_with = []
• enabled_states (string[])
• y_rotation_offset (float)

defaultSnippets.label: Block Placement Direction
defaultSnippets.description: Adds the "minecraft:cardinal_direction", "minecraft:facing_direction" and/or "minecraft:corner_and_cardinal_direction" states and setter function to the block.

minecraft:placement_direction.x-runtime-constraint-description: "y_rotation_offset" can only be used when "minecraft:cardinal_direction" and/or "minecraft:facing_direction" are enabled in "enabled_states". and "blocks_to_corner_with" can only be used when "minecraft:corner_and_cardinal_direction" is enabled in "enabled_states".

minecraft:placement_position.title: Minecraft Placement Position
minecraft:placement_position.description:
Adds the "minecraft:block_face" and/or "minecraft:vertical_half" states and setter function to the block.

Properties:
• enabled_states (string[])

defaultSnippets.label: Block Placement Position
defaultSnippets.description: Adds the "minecraft:block_face" and/or "minecraft:vertical_half" states and setter function to the block.
